title: rubus hirtus var. livescens
intro: Rubus hirtus var. livescens, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of bramble that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Rubus hirtus var. livescens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
